<div align="center">
    <h1>【 STRiiP 】</h1>

> [!WARNING]
> This repository is a fork made for learning purposes and a WIP.

### Overview
STRiiP is a fork of [end-4/dots-hyprland](https://github.com/end-4/dots-hyprland). 

I want to remove everything I don't need or use from the dots and, in the process, learn more about them and about Bash scripting, Qt QML, Quickshell and coding in general, trying to rely less and less on ai help.

If i manage to completely remove everything i don't use, i will then start to add my own modifications.

### Installation script

```bash
bash -c "$(curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/3d3f/striip/main/striip.sh)"
```
